content_body:
This was our second trip to Blue Ridge, but our first stay at Appalachian Sunrise. This place is AMAZING!!! The cabin and all of the beautiful furnishings were incredible! Then, of course, there was this beautiful view! So peaceful and relaxing. My husband, myself, and our youngest daughter picked up our oldest from Atlanta from a study abroad trip to Rome, Italy, and headed straight here! It was so nice for all of us to get reconnected, relax, and hear about her stories from her travels!

We enjoyed playing pool, hot dogs and s'mores by the fire, along with some amazing thunderstorms! Our first night here, I saw a Mama Black Bear and her two cubs walking down the road! My husband saw a deer this morning. I could go on and on! I know this will not be the last time we stay here! Thank you so much for providing such a wonderful place to enjoy. We will be back!
title: AMAZING!!!
